description: A cropped fragment of a graph/network diagram showing multiple numbered circles (140, 189, 188, 143) connected by straight black edges. The circles contain black serif/sans-serif digits on a white background, linked in a node-edge pattern typical of a graph or flowchart.
position: fragment of a larger graph diagram; visible nodes are 140 (top, partially cut off), 189 (center-right), 188 (center-left), and 143 (bottom, partially cut off)
